title: Cedar Design System – A Framework from Rei
content: Cedar from Directories: Components: Cedar Design System is a comprehensive framework and set of guidelines REI, tailored for digital products and experiences, aligning with the brand's visual language. Design System distributes flexible design elements, typography, color system, and UI elements empowering teams with the tools needed to craft functional, reusable components while maintaining alignment with the brand. Accessibility Color System Component overview Elevation Figma Repository Icons Motion Patterns Responsive Spacing Styles Theming Tokens Typography Voice and Tone Accordion Alert banner Breadcrumb Button Cards Checkbox Chip Data table Icon Link List Modal Pagination Popover Radio button Segmented control Select Snackbar Switch Tabs Text field Tooltip
